Published Time: Tue, 14 Apr 2026 06:06:26 GMT

Markdown Content:
# My Sold Listings - Adrian Roach

[![Image 11: Brokerage logo](https://images-static.moxiworks.com/static/images/br/w_real_estate/WRE_darkBG_2020.png)![Image 13: Brokerage logo](https://images-static.moxiworks.com/static/images/br/w_real_estate/WRE_darkBG_2020.png)![Image 15: Brokerage logo](https://images-static.moxiworks.com/static/images/br/w_real_estate/WRE_lightBG_2020.png)![Image 17: Brokerage logo](https://images-static.moxiworks.com/static/images/br/w_real_estate/WRE_lightBG_2020.png)](https://adrianroach.com/)

## Santa Rosa Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 950 Shiloh Vista Santa Rosa, CA 95403

4 Bed 

8 Baths 

13038 sqft

 $3,700,000 (USD)

## Windsor Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 11424 Brooks Road Windsor, CA 95492

4 Bed 

4 Baths 

4432 sqft

 Welcome to 11424 Brooks Rd. in Windsor. This custom, single-story home sprawls over 4400sf, where you'll find 4 spacious bedrooms, 3.5 baths, a 3 car garage and gated entry. Comprised of 2 parcels, this 21+ acre estate has 3 acres of Pinot Noir, and 1/2 acre of Sauvignon Blanc. There is also a high producing well that has been tested at 80 gal/min. Perfect for entertaining, you'll find a sparkling pool, outdoor kitchen and Bocce ball court. Inside the chef's kitchen, you'll find appliances from Wolff and Subzero. The primary suite has a sitting area with double sided fireplace and access to a patio with vineyard views. Other amenities include owned solar, and a whole house generator. Although it feels like you're miles away from civilization, shopping, and restaurants, they are only 2 miles away. The wine country destination of Healdsburg is only 4 miles away, and for those that may stay or work at home there is even Starlink WiFi available. 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / W Real Estate Windsor / Adrian Roach 

 $2,875,000 (USD)

## Penngrove Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 701 Penngrove Avenue Penngrove, CA 94951

5 Bed 

5 Baths 

5100 sqft

 Secluded from the street lies 701 & 703 Penngrove Ave. This elegant, single level Mediterranean Estate on 2.75 acres was custom built in 2006 is approximately 4260 w/ an expansive open kitchen. The 4 bedroom, 3.5 bathroom house includes a media / office room, 4 car garage, formal living & dining rooms. The circular driveway, grand entry & soaring ceilings further make this property special. Custom cabinets and vanities throughout.703 Penngrove Ave is a permitted 840 square foot ADU and covered porch with a 400 square foot garage built in 2013. 703 has a side driveway and fenced in yard with a hot tub and vegetable beds. The grounds of 701 Penngrove include an expansive 24x30 pool & spa built by McDonald pools in 2013. Multiple outdoor pergolas and seated areas to enjoy the sun and shade. Two separate owned solar system for house & pool. A beautiful tool shed & special dog run area sit next to each other. Have it ALL, this special legacy property offers a pocket of privacy 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / Coldwell Banker Realty / Nicole Marzo 

 $2,500,000 (USD)

## Windsor Area Single Family Home

 Sold 

### 1520 Mount Weske Drive Windsor, CA 95492

3 Bed 

3 Baths 

0 sqft

 The natural beauty & unique amenities of this enchanting property are rarely found in today's market. The legacy of this equestrian wine country estate offers a refined lifestyle that has endured through generations. Impressive 1890's Victorian round barn apprx 14000sf. 20+ stalls, office, 1/2BA, equestrian riding arena. 3BR/2.5BA, pool/spa, outdoor kitchen/lanai, greenhouse/workshop; Caretaker cottage 2BR/1BA. Adjacent to Foothill Regional Park 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / Sotheby's International Realty / Sheryl Morgensen 

 $2,350,000 (USD)

## Santa Rosa Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 3764 Saint Andrews Drive Santa Rosa, CA 95403

4 Bed 

5 Baths 

3531 sqft

 This newly constructed single level home on 1/4 acre offers sweeping views over the second fairway of Fountaingrove Golf Course. The exceptional designer appeal showcases double entry doors, extensive use of wide plank hardwood flooring and vaulted ceilings. The great room has a fireplace, temperature-controlled wine display showcase and stacking glass doors that open to the view terrace featuring an outdoor kitchen. An open concept great room, kitchen and dining area have all the amenities any chef would desire, including a quartz center island, Monogram appliances and walk-in pantry. There are 4 bedrooms, 3.5 baths on the main level, including a bonus/game room (the 4th bedroom could be a possible office). A lower level studio with a full bath could be an ideal gym or art studio with a separate entrance. A generous sized view terrace overlooking the lawn and golf course boasts an outdoor kitchen with a Summerset built-in grill, sink and beverage refrigerator. 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / Coldwell Banker Realty / Mary Anne Veldkamp 

 $2,020,000 (USD)

## Healdsburg Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 746 Dragonfly Lane Healdsburg, CA 95448

3 Bed 

3 Baths 

3204 sqft

 This unique property is situated in the southern end of Healdsburg. This stunning home, with AMAZING views, is a perfect blend of classic farmhouse and modern design, sure to please even the most discerning buyers. This home can live like a single level as all bedrooms, two full baths, kitchen, and living areas are on the main level. The kitchen is equipped with stainless steel appliances and an island with double waterfall edges. Go green with owned solar, Tesla battery back up and 2 EV chargers! Speaking of green, you'll find 2 putting greens, chipping greens and an incorporated creek into the golf-scape. There's even an 8 speaker Sonance sound system around the large putting green and the climate-controlled clubhouse which has a bar area and a deck. Above the oversized 2-car garage, there is a state-of-the-art movie theater room and flex space. If you follow the stairwell from the family room, you'll find a separate area with private entry, that includes a half bath and work space, that could potentially function as a fourth bedroom, gym or... This area of Healdsburg also happens to allow permitting for short term rentals. 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / W Real Estate Windsor / Adrian Roach 

 $1,800,000 (USD)

## Petaluma Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 241 Liberty Road Petaluma, CA 94952

3 Bed 

3 Baths 

3496 sqft

 This beautiful, gated, 10-acre estate is located in highly desirable West Petaluma. A private, paved driveway takes you through the previous Christmas tree farm to this magnificent home. As you enter the home, you are welcomed by a spiral staircase, open concept living and dining space accented with vaulted ceilings, large view windows and hardwood flooring. The updated kitchen boasts cherry cabinets, granite counters and stainless steel appliances. The outdoor venue is a private oasis complimented with extensive trek decking perfect for enjoying morning coffee or sipping wine in the evening. Host your visitors in the 1200sf, detached, guest unit. Come experience this amazing home and enjoy the dramatic Petaluma Valley views. All located just minutes from world renown wineries, shopping, dining and regional parks. Owners have invested over $500,000 in upgrades in the past few years. 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / Coldwell Banker Realty / Valerie Hall 

 $1,750,000 (USD)

## Lower Lake Area Single Family Home

 Sold 

### 12220 Perini Road Lower Lake, CA 95457

7 Bed 

3 Baths 

4161 sqft

 Located in Red Hills AVA, this ranch consists of 2 parcels totaling 183 acres which have been under the stewardship of the same family for 5 generations. Parcel 1 is developed with a 1,816 sf 3-bdrm/1.5-bath craftsman home. Parcel 2 is developed with a 2,345 sf, 4bed/2.5bath ranch home overlooking 7.0 acre certified organic walnut orchard, a large shop and is fenced/cross-fenced for livestock. Multiple water sources. Serious vineyard potential. 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / Coldwell Banker Bofv St Helena / Erin Lail 

 $1,625,000 (USD)

## Santa Rosa Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 4501 Trenton Road Santa Rosa, CA 95401

5 Bed 

4 Baths 

3030 sqft

 Situated on over five acres down a private road and nestled into a hillside, this charming compound welcomes you to privacy and serenity. Inside the main house, you'll find three bedrooms - two of which have French doors to the outside - and two full bathrooms. Bathed in light, the primary suite has been tastefully updated featuring an ensuite bath with a clawfoot soaking tub. The charming kitchen retains the original mid-century tile and style with freshly painted cabinets. Overlooking the lush greenery outside, the great room boasts serene views and a wood-burning fireplace. Adjacent to the main house is the sweet outbuilding that has been converted to a two story bonus space, each with its own private entrance and perfect for a home office or art studio. Tucked up above the outbuilding is a darling one bedroom guest cottage that has been completely remodeled and renovated, with vaulted ceilings and skylights. Completing the compound is a bonus studio space - complete full bath and a deck overlooking the large green lawn below. As you explore the property, you'll find a water fountain, blackberry bushes, and all kinds of flowers and lush greenery. Enjoy the spaciousness and privacy of this park-like setting. 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / Hedge Realty / Tim Little + Alexa Glockner Team 

 $1,525,000 (USD)

## Healdsburg Area Single Family Home

 Sold 

### 1202 Chiquita Road Healdsburg, CA 95448

4 Bed 

2 Baths 

2101 sqft

 Wander down this private lane to find the ideal wine country parcel. Incredible views abound w/ the big 3, Mt. St. Helena, Geysers & Fitch Mtn all in the distance. Home has been updated w/ newer carpet, interior/ exterior paint. Large deck overlooks property & perfect for private entertaining. Zoning allows for vacation rentals & additional unit. All amenities of a country parcel & only 5 minutes to the Plaza. Perfect full time home or getaway. 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / Sonoma Realty Group / Ryan Anderton 

 $1,510,000 (USD)

## Cotati Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 12 Gilman Ranch Road Cotati, CA 94931

4 Bed 

4 Baths 

3588 sqft

 Located in an exclusive enclave of semi-custom homes sits this amazing craftsman on a corner lot. Boasting nearly 3600sf, there are 4 spacious, upstairs bedrooms. The primary bedroom has 2 generous closets with built-ins and a spa-like bathroom. The en-suite bedroom has its own remodeled bath along with a walk-in closet with organizers. There is even a loft area that's great for working at home or homeschooling! From the wrap-around front porch to the gourmet chef's kitchen to the movie theater room this home nearly has it all. Other updates include new hardwood floors downstairs and new paint inside and out. And don't forget about the inground pool for those hot summer days that even has a salute to everyone's favorite beagle, Snoopy! All of this is set in a great location with everything Cotati has to offer with shopping, restaurants, and easy highway access. 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / W Real Estate Windsor / Adrian Roach 

 $1,475,000 (USD)

3 Bed 

3 Baths 

2898 sqft

 Gorgeous vineyard property sprawling 7 total acres and offering 5+/- acres of planted pinot noir. The Spanish/Mediterranean-style home features 2300 square feet of living space, 3 spacious bedrooms and 2.5 baths. The estate also includes an office/flex space and a 1500 square foot detached workshop with water and power. The master bedroom features amazing easterly vineyard views that make for spectacular sunrises!

Beautifully landscaped yard with automatic sprinklers.

## Windsor Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 1209 Davida Court Windsor, CA 95492

5 Bed 

3 Baths 

2926 sqft

 Beautifully updated 5-bedroom Windsor home on nearly half an acre with direct access into Foothill Regional Park. The private backyard retreat offers a saltwater pool and spa with stamped concrete surround, Trex decking, and lush landscaping. The kitchen was remodeled with quartz countertops and features a JennAir refrigerator, dishwasher, and downdraft range with indoor grill option, plus a KitchenAid convection oven. Additional highlights include crown molding, wood and travertine flooring, fresh interior and exterior paint, and custom built-ins. A newer roof and gutters, along with numerous thoughtful upgrades, add to the home's turnkey appeal. Dual-zone heating and cooling, ceiling fans, and energy-efficient systems provide year-round comfort. Professionally landscaped grounds with stone walkways, irrigation, and ambient lighting create an elegant backdrop for both intimate gatherings and grand entertaining. Ideally located near downtown Windsor's Music on the Green, farmers' market, and just minutes from Healdsburg's world-class dining and wineries. 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / Coldwell Banker Realty / Mary Anne Veldkamp 

 $1,300,000 (USD)

## Santa Rosa Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 1927 Lyon Court Santa Rosa, CA 95403

4 Bed 

3 Baths 

2890 sqft

 Nestled in the exclusive Fountaingrove neighborhood, this stunning 4-bedroom, 3-bath luxury home offers unparalleled elegance and charm. Boasting 2,890 square feet of living space, it showcases an expansive open-concept design with abundant large windows, flooding the home with natural light. Enjoy cooking in the gourmet chef's kitchen equipped with top-of-the-line appliances, gorgeous countertops, and a spacious island. Retreat to the primary suite, complete with a spa-like bathroom featuring a soaking tub and frameless glass shower. Additional amenities include a 2 car garage, a bonus room, and smart home technology throughout. Located minutes from the Fountaingrove Golf and Athletic Club, Nagasawa and Rincon Ridge Parks and within the award-winning Santa Rosa school district, this home offers the epitome of modern Santa Rosa living. Schedule a private tour today and imagine your new life in this exquisite home. 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / Berghof Realty / Ernest Berghof 

 $1,235,000 (USD)

## Windsor Area Single Family Home

 Sold 

### 1499 Gumview Road Windsor, CA 95492

3 Bed 

3 Baths 

2603 sqft

 Nestled into a flat acre-and-a half and backing to over 300 acres of vineyard sits this nostalgic 1990's built Victorian home. Coming up the tree lined driveway leads you to a wraparound porch and a 2,733sf. home with 4 bedrooms and 3.5 baths. Ornate woodworking, wainscoting, and even a turret in the master bedroom, are just a few of the traditional features that can be found in this amazing home. The above-ground pool and surrounding deck make for the perfect setting to enjoy the sunsets overlooking the adjacent vineyard. The spacious yard is perfect for entertaining and there is plenty of room for all of your toys or equipment. There is even an RV pad with full hookups. There are also an abundance of fruit trees and a garden area with irrigation for the greenest of thumbs to enjoy. 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / W Real Estate Windsor / Adrian Roach 

 $1,200,000 (USD)

## Windsor Area Single Family Home

 Sold 

### 8276 Starr Road Windsor, CA 95492

3 Bed 

4 Baths 

3375 sqft

 Set back, up a meandering drive way, in a majestic country setting, sits this beautiful home. Living mainly as a single story with the exception of a loft, this 2007 built estate home has wood floors, boasts stately columns and over 20' high ceilings in the family room. The kitchen is adorned in chef's features like imported Caesar stone counter tops, stainless appliances, and built-in Thermador fridge. The over-sized master suite features space for an office, boasts large dual closets, cathedral ceilings and a sumptuous master bath with newly redone shower. The loft has a full bathroom which makes for a spacious fourth bedroom, game room, or theater room. The one acre lot gives plenty of room to roam and even has room for a pool or RV parking. Special properties like this don't often come up in Windsor, so don't miss out! Virtual Walk through here: https://my.matterport.com/show/?m=eyE7ovCLQyv 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / W Real Estate Windsor / Adrian Roach 

 $1,160,000 (USD)

3 Baths

Newly built with finished interior, this 2 storied shed is your perfect 'she-shed' or 'man cave'! Walk or bike to Windsor's Town Green, shopping, restaurants, & schools!

## Santa Rosa Area Single Family Home

 Sold 

### 440 Halter Court Santa Rosa, CA 95401

4 Bed 

3 Baths 

2714 sqft

 Rare offering in the gated community of Countryside Estates. You'll be welcomed down the tree lined streets to this 4 bedroom, 3 bath home that features over 2700s/f of living space. The updated kitchen has white cabinets, quartz counter tops and stainless appliances including new double ovens, cook top, and trash compactor. Within the spacious .41 acre lot, there is a sparkling pool and open concept pool house, which also has a 1/2 bath. The 3 car garage has ample room for the car enthusiast, or for storage. There is also, a less than one year old, 50 year roof. 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / W Real Estate Windsor / Adrian Roach 

 $1,112,712 (USD)

## Windsor Area Residential Home

 Sold 

### 9416 Elsie Way Windsor, CA 95492

3 Bed 

3 Baths 

2448 sqft

 This is a Vinecrest Estates exclusive single story home. Featuring an expansive 3 bedroom & 2 bathroom home located on just under 1/2 acre. Enjoy the formal entry way and sunken sunlit formal living room with fireplace. Stunning formal dining room with coffered ceilings. Large gourmet style kitchen with oak cabinets, tile counters, wood block center island and walk in pantry. The sizable family room features fireplace, nook overlooking rear yard and slider to covered deck. Primary suite features vaulted ceilings, sitting area & slider to rear deck. Primary bathroom features tiled dual sinks, jetted tub, stall shower, cosmetic counter, walk in closet & enclosed washroom. Two additional bedrooms with walk in closets. Hall bathroom with shower over tub, large tile vanity and room to prepare for the day. Additionally this home has a newer roof, newer windows & window coverings, newer carpet, skylights, recessed lighting and oak woodwork through-out the home. Sweeping private rear yard encompassing fruit trees, lawn area, rock pathways, brick patio & covered deck. All eagerly awaiting spring flowers & your green thumb to bring back its glory day. Do not miss the slate stone driveway and RV/Boat parking! 1/2 block to private rear entrance of Foothill Park Regional park. 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / Vanguard Properties / Kerry Jones 

 $1,050,000 (USD)

Located just around the corner from Whole Foods and less than a mile from the vibrant shops and restaurants of Downtown Petaluma, this home combines comfort, style, and unbeatable location! 

 Listing Courtesy of BAREIS / W Real Estate Windsor / Adrian Roach 

 $752,000 (USD)
